articles.title: Micron Stock Dives After Memory Chip Rivals SK Hynix, Samsung Tumble in KOSPI Selloff - Barron's
articles.description: Micron stock is dropping after SK Hynix and Samsung stocks tumbled Tuesday on the KOSPI index as the tech selloff gathers pace.
articles.content: SK HynixandSamsungstocks tumbled Tuesday as South Koreas red-hot KOSPI index fell 10%. Its a sign the tech selloff is set to gather pace and could be a bad omen for fellow memory-chip makerMicronin U… [+111 chars]

articles.title: With Starfall, SpaceX eyes an edge in global cargo delivery from orbit - Ars Technica
articles.description: The purpose of Starfall is to support the "transport and delivery of goods through space."

articles.author: Lisa Kailai Han, Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: S&P 500 futures are little changed after tech sell-off drags down broad market index: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Tech giants tumbled in Monday's regular trading, dragging down the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite.
articles.content:
S&P 500 futures traded near the flatline on Monday night after a sell-off in tech giants dragged down the broad market index.
